prompt: Create a dreamy cinematic square image of a sleeping child in a soft pastel bedroom at night, surrounded by cute tiny fantasy dream creatures. The child, young child, lies sideways under a pale floral blanket on a fluffy pillow, with dark hair visible and face mostly turned toward the pillow, peaceful and asleep. Use a warm muted film look with shallow depth of field, soft grain, gentle vignetting, and cozy low light from a small lantern. Include exactly 8 visible creatures: 1 large plush-like white spiky creature peeking over the left pillow with glossy black eyes; 1 small beige bug-like creature with two antennae sitting on the left pillow; 1 fuzzy mint-green humanoid creature standing near the child and holding a tiny glowing lantern; 1 small golden floating creature with tiny horns hovering in the blurred background above the child; 1 brown fuzzy rabbit-like creature with translucent insect wings sitting on the right pillow; 1 pale blue rounded ghost-like creature smiling from the right background; 1 tiny pale pink bunny creature seen from behind at the bottom center foreground; and 1 blue-green spiky creature sitting at the lower right, turned toward the sleeping child. Bedroom details should be softly blurred: patterned wallpaper, framed pictures, shelves, and warm nursery decor. Color palette: dusty pink, cream, mint green, pale blue, warm amber. Mood: good dreams, tender, whimsical, quiet. Style: photorealistic miniature fantasy creatures mixed with soft Studio Ghibli-like dream realism. Camera: close intimate bedside view, 1:1 square composition, eye-level, 35mm lens feel, shallow focus on the sleeping child and nearby creatures. Constraints: no text, no watermark, no horror tone, no sharp harsh lighting, keep all creatures gentle and toy-like with rounded bodies and glossy eyes.
